title: ImagineBook
body:
# ImagineBook
<sup>_(reads as "Image in book")_</sup>

This mod allows you to add images to your books. Mod is fully clientside so you can add images even on servers, and other mod users also will see them.

You can use [https://imgur.com/](https://imgur.com/) to upload images 

![Book ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iCl1mF5K/images/696e649d3cf081ccd80172d11195010398bd3525.png)

You can add image even if you don't have mod installed using mod's image format: [url,x,y,width%,height%,rotation°]
